fields.description: Depart from Kathmandu and travel to Dhangadhi. Enjoy scenic views of rivers, forests, hills, and settlements along the journey. Explore the local market and cultural surroundings in the evening.

Departure from Kathmandu in the morning and travel toward Dobate Forest Camp. Upon arrival, check in and enjoy lunch. Explore nearby forest trails, observe local flora and fauna, and participate in recreational activities. In the evening, enjoy a campfire and dinner before an overnight stay at the camp.

Wake up early to enjoy the natural surroundings and fresh mountain air. After breakfast, take a short guided forest walk and photography session. Have lunch and begin the return journey to kathmandu, concluding the tour.
Travel from Dhangadhi to Mangalsen, the headquarters of Achham District. Explore traditional villages, local architecture, and hill viewpoints while learning about the unique culture of the region.

Arrive at Aaitabare and check into the hotel. Explore the local market area, interact with local residents, observe daily village life, taste local foods, and enjoy an evening walk around the town while experiencing the culture and atmosphere of eastern Nepal.

Visit Betana Wetland for a full day of nature exploration. Enjoy bird watching, walk through the surrounding forest area, observe local wildlife, relax near the lake, take photographs of the scenic landscape, and experience the peaceful natural environment of the region.
Explore the Kanepokhari area, visit local marketplaces, observe agricultural landscapes, interact with local communities, enjoy regional food, and prepare for the return journey.

Depart early from Kathmandu and travel through scenic highways toward eastern Nepal. Upon arrival, hike to Aale Danda viewpoint and explore the surrounding hill area. Spend time enjoying panoramic mountain and valley views, taking photographs, and relaxing in nature. Experience sunrise or sunset depending on arrival time, interact with local villagers nearby, and enjoy simple local food before returning back or staying briefly for rest.
Fly from Kathmandu to Lukla and begin trekking to Phakding. Enjoy views of mountain landscapes and traditional Sherpa settlements.
Trek through forests and suspension bridges alongside the Dudh Koshi River. Reach Namche Bazaar, the gateway to the Everest region.
Continue through Tengboche Monastery and alpine landscapes before arriving at Pangboche village.
Trek to Ama Dablam Base Camp. Enjoy spectacular panoramic views of Ama Dablam and neighboring Himalayan peaks. Explore the surrounding area and return to Pangboche for an overnight stay.
Begin the return trek through Tengboche and descend toward Namche Bazaar.
Trek back to Lukla and take a return flight to Kathmandu, concluding the adventure.
Drive from Kathmandu to Machha Khola through scenic hills, rivers, and rural settlements. Overnight stay at Machha Khola.

Jagat is a picturesque mountain village in Gorkha District known for its scenic landscapes, traditional culture, and role as the entry point to the Manaslu Conservation Area. It offers breathtaking views, trekking opportunities, and an authentic Himalayan experience.
Continue trekking through beautiful landscapes, waterfalls, and traditional villages before reaching Amjilosa. Explore the village and enjoy local hospitality.
Enjoy morning views, local cultural experiences, and photography opportunities before beginning the return journey toward Kathmandu.
Fly from Kathmandu to Lukla and begin trekking through beautiful mountain landscapes.
Trek through dense forests and ascend gradually toward Chutanga.
ross scenic ridges and enjoy spectacular mountain views.

Arrive at the beautiful Chhukung Valley surrounded by towering Himalayan peaks and glaciers. The valley offers stunning views of Ama Dablam, Lhotse, and Island Peak, making it an ideal stop for acclimatization and exploration.

Continue trekking through rugged alpine terrain and glacial landscapes toward Thangnak. The trail passes through remote mountain environments with breathtaking views of surrounding peaks and moraine-covered valleys.
Reach Amphu Lapcha Base Camp and prepare for the challenging high-altitude pass crossing. Enjoy spectacular views of glaciers, snow-covered mountains, and the pristine Himalayan wilderness.

Cross the challenging Amphu Lapcha Pass at approximately 5,845 meters. Experience one of Nepal's most adventurous trekking routes while enjoying panoramic views of Everest, Lhotse, Ama Dablam, Island Peak, and surrounding Himalayan peaks.
Descend into Chhukung Valley after the pass crossing. Relax and enjoy the magnificent mountain scenery, glaciers, and traditional Sherpa culture.
Trek through scenic Himalayan trails and Sherpa settlements toward Namche Bazaar, the vibrant commercial and cultural center of the Khumbu region.
Complete the final trek to Lukla and take a flight back to Kathmandu, marking the end of the Amphu Lapcha Pass adventure.

Depart from Kathmandu early in the morning and travel to Ilam. Enjoy scenic views of rivers, hills, and rural settlements along the highway. Arrive in Ilam and spend the evening exploring the town and nearby tea gardens.

Travel to Antu Danda and explore the famous viewpoint. Enjoy panoramic views of rolling tea estates, green hills, and the eastern Himalayan range. Witness a spectacular sunset and experience the peaceful atmosphere of the area.

Wake up early for sunrise at Antu Danda, then visit Kanyam Tea Garden, one of Nepal's most famous tea destinations. Enjoy the scenic tea plantations, photography opportunities, and refreshing environment before returning to Kathmandu.
Depart from Kathmandu and travel to Khandbari, the district headquarters of Sankhuwasabha. Enjoy scenic views of rivers, hills, forests, and rural settlements along the route.

Visit the Arun Hydropower Dam Area and learn about Nepal's hydropower development. Explore the surrounding river valley, enjoy the natural scenery, and observe the impressive engineering infrastructure built along the Arun River.
Visit Tumlingtar, a beautiful riverside town known as a gateway to eastern Himalayan regions. Enjoy local sightseeing before beginning the return journey to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Khandbari through scenic hills, rivers, and rural settlements. Explore the local area and prepare for the trail adventure.

Explore the Arun River Cliff Trail and enjoy spectacular views of the Arun River gorge, towering cliffs, forests, and surrounding landscapes. Participate in hiking, sightseeing, and photography while experiencing the natural beauty of eastern Nepal.
Visit Tumlingtar and enjoy riverside scenery before beginning the return journey to Kathmandu. Experience local culture and beautiful views of the Arun Valley.

Travel insurance
Personal expenses
Extra beverages
Personal adventure gear
Photography and video services
Additional activities not mentioned
Tips and gratuities
Emergency evacuation costs

Experience an exciting day of white-water rafting on the Arun River. Navigate thrilling rapids, enjoy stunning river valley scenery, and learn rafting techniques from professional guides. Relax by the riverside after completing the adventure.
Visit Khandbari and explore the surrounding area before beginning the return journey to Kathmandu. Enjoy views of the Arun Valley and local cultural attractions.
Travel from Kathmandu to Dharan while enjoying scenic views of hills, rivers, and settlements. Explore the vibrant city and local attractions.

Visit the sacred Baraha Kshetra Temple and participate in religious and cultural activities. Explore the temple complex, enjoy the serene riverside environment, and learn about its historical and spiritual significance.
Visit the nearby Koshi River area for sightseeing and nature observation before beginning the return journey to Kathmandu.

Visit the Achham Heritage Museum and explore exhibits featuring historical artifacts, traditional tools, ancient household items, cultural displays, local costumes, manuscripts, and heritage collections that reflect the identity of Achham and Far-Western Nepal.

Explore the scenic Achham Highland Route, known for its breathtaking hill landscapes, traditional settlements, terraced farmlands, and panoramic mountain views. Visitors can enjoy nature walks, photography, and authentic cultural experiences while learning about the lifestyle and traditions of the local communities in Achham.
Visit Achham Bazaar, interact with local residents, explore traditional markets, sample local cuisine, and purchase regional handicrafts before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Tumlingtar and enjoy scenic views of eastern Nepal's hills, rivers, and rural landscapes. Prepare for the trekking adventure ahead.
Travel to Khandbari, the gateway to the Makalu region. Explore local markets, cultural sites, and enjoy beautiful views of surrounding hills.
Journey to Num, a picturesque mountain village offering stunning views of deep river valleys and Himalayan landscapes. Experience local Rai and Sherpa culture.
Begin trekking through forests, terraced farmlands, and traditional settlements. Enter the Makalu Barun National Park region and enjoy the area's natural beauty.
Continue trekking through scenic mountain trails and traditional villages. Enjoy panoramic views of surrounding peaks and rich biodiversity.
Reach the magnificent Barun Valley and explore its breathtaking landscapes featuring waterfalls, alpine meadows, glacial rivers, and towering mountain cliffs.
Take an excursion toward the higher reaches of the valley and enjoy spectacular views of Mount Makalu, glaciers, and pristine Himalayan wilderness.
Begin the return journey, reflecting on the incredible adventure through one of Nepal's most beautiful and remote valleys.
Travel from Kathmandu to Itahari through scenic highways, rivers, and hill landscapes. Explore the local market and enjoy the vibrant atmosphere of eastern Nepal.

Visit Belbari Wetland and explore its rich ecosystem. Enjoy bird watching, nature walks, wildlife observation, and photography opportunities while learning about wetland conservation and biodiversity.
Travel from Kathmandu to Tumlingtar and enjoy scenic views of rivers, forests, hills, and rural settlements. Explore the local surroundings and prepare for the journey into the Arun Valley region.

Visit Beni Ghat and enjoy the peaceful riverside environment. Explore nearby trails, observe local village life, capture beautiful photographs, and relax while enjoying the natural beauty of the surrounding landscape.
Travel to Khandbari and explore the district headquarters, local markets, and cultural attractions before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Tumlingtar while enjoying scenic views of hills, rivers, forests, and local settlements. Explore the town and prepare for the river valley excursion.

Visit Beni River Junction and explore the beautiful river confluence. Enjoy riverside walks, photography, sightseeing, and panoramic views of the surrounding hills and valleys. Experience the peaceful natural environment and local culture.
Visit Khandbari and explore local markets, cultural sites, and viewpoints before beginning the return journey to Kathmandu.
Fly or travel to Lukla, the gateway to the Everest region. Explore the town and prepare for the trek ahead.
Begin trekking through beautiful pine forests, suspension bridges, and Sherpa settlements. Arrive at Phakding and enjoy the peaceful mountain atmosphere.

Continue trekking along the Dudh Koshi River to Benkar Village. Explore the traditional settlement, interact with local residents, enjoy scenic mountain views, and experience authentic Sherpa culture.
Trek toward Monjo, the gateway to Sagarmatha National Park. Enjoy views of rivers, forests, and Himalayan landscapes before beginning the return journey.
Travel from Kathmandu to Itahari through scenic highways, river valleys, and hill landscapes. Explore the city and enjoy local cuisine before an overnight stay.

Visit Betana Wetland and explore its tranquil lake, surrounding forest, and rich biodiversity. Enjoy bird watching, boating, nature photography, and peaceful walks along the wetland trails while learning about local conservation efforts.
Explore Belbari and nearby natural attractions before beginning the return journey to Kathmandu. Experience local culture, markets, and the beautiful environment of eastern Nepal.
Travel from Kathmandu to Itahari through scenic highways, river valleys, and hill landscapes. Explore the city and local surroundings before an overnight stay.

Visit Beteni Simsar and explore its rich wetland ecosystem. Enjoy bird watching, nature photography, wildlife observation, and peaceful walks through the conservation area while learning about local biodiversity.
Explore Belbari and nearby natural attractions before beginning the return journey to Kathmandu. Experience local culture and the natural beauty of eastern Nepal.
Travel from Kathmandu to Jiri, enjoying scenic views of hills, rivers, and traditional settlements. Explore the historic gateway to the Everest trekking region.
Journey to Bhandar Village and explore its traditional houses, monasteries, and beautiful terraced landscapes. Experience local culture and hospitality while enjoying panoramic mountain views.
Take a short hike to nearby viewpoints and forests. Enjoy breathtaking views of the surrounding hills, valleys, and Himalayan peaks while experiencing the natural beauty of the region.
Visit local markets and cultural sites in Jiri before beginning the return journey to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Dharan through scenic highways, rivers, and hill landscapes. Explore Dharan's local markets, temples, and vibrant culture before an overnight stay.

Visit Bhedetar View Tower and enjoy spectacular panoramic views of the Himalayan range, green hills, and surrounding valleys. Explore nearby viewpoints, enjoy photography, and experience the cool mountain atmosphere.
Explore the historic town of Dhankuta, known for its traditional architecture, local culture, and scenic hill landscapes. Visit local markets and enjoy panoramic views before returning to Kathmandu.

Travel from Kathmandu to Bhojpur and explore the vibrant Bhojpur Bazaar. Experience local culture, traditional markets, and the famous Bhojpure craftsmanship while enjoying the scenic hill-town atmosphere.

Visit the historic Bhojpur Durbar Area and explore the architectural heritage and cultural significance of the district. Learn about the history of the region while enjoying panoramic views of the surrounding hills and settlements.

Spend the day at Bhojpur Hill Station, enjoying cool mountain weather, breathtaking viewpoints, photography opportunities, and beautiful landscapes. The area offers spectacular views of hills, valleys, and distant Himalayan ranges.

Experience a scenic trek through the hills surrounding Bhojpur. Walk along natural trails, enjoy beautiful forests and viewpoints, observe local village life, and immerse yourself in the natural beauty of eastern Nepal before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Tumlingtar, a scenic town in eastern Nepal and an important gateway to Sankhuwasabha. Enjoy beautiful views of hills, rivers, and rural landscapes.
Travel to Khandbari, the headquarters of Sankhuwasabha District. Explore local markets, cultural sites, and enjoy panoramic views of the surrounding hills and valleys.
Journey into Bhotkhola Valley and experience its pristine Himalayan environment. Enjoy stunning mountain views, river valleys, natural landscapes, and traditional settlements.
Explore the scenic Arun River Cliff Trail, known for its dramatic river gorge views, rugged cliffs, and breathtaking natural landscapes. Enjoy photography and nature exploration.
Visit Beni River Junction, where beautiful rivers meet amidst lush hills and valleys. Relax in the peaceful environment before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Tumlingtar and enjoy scenic views of eastern Nepal's hills, rivers, forests, and rural settlements.
Visit Khandbari, the district headquarters of Sankhuwasabha. Explore local markets, cultural sites, and beautiful hill landscapes.

Explore Bibre Valley and enjoy its stunning natural beauty, peaceful surroundings, forests, streams, and mountain scenery. The valley provides excellent opportunities for photography, nature walks, and relaxation.
Visit the Arun River Cliff Trail and experience dramatic river gorge views, cliffs, and beautiful landscapes before returning to Kathmandu.
Depart from Kathmandu early morning. Arrive in Janakpur and check in to the hotel. Visit Janaki Temple, Ram Mandir, Vivaha Mandap, and explore the evening market.
Visit the sacred ponds and nearby religious sites. Explore local Mithila art shops before returning to Kathmandu.
Visit the sacred ponds and nearby religious sites. Explore local Mithila art shops before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from kathmandu to Janakpur. Visit Janaki Temple and attend the evening Aarati.
Visit Vivaha Mandap, Ram Mandir, and nearby sacred ponds before returning.

Travel from Kathmandu to Gorkha and visit the historic Gorkha Durbar, the birthplace of King Prithvi Narayan Shah. Explore the palace complex, Gorakhnath Temple, and enjoy panoramic views of the surrounding hills and Himalayan landscapes.

Visit the Gorkha Museum to discover the rich history, culture, and traditions of the Gorkha region. Explore historical artifacts, traditional weapons, photographs, manuscripts, and exhibits highlighting Nepal's unification and the legacy of the Gorkha Kingdom.

Travel to Ajirkot and explore its scenic hills, traditional villages, terraced farmlands, and forests. Interact with local communities, experience authentic rural culture, and enjoy the peaceful natural surroundings with panoramic mountain views.

Visit the renowned Manakamana Temple, one of Nepal's most sacred Hindu pilgrimage sites. Enjoy panoramic hill views, explore the temple surroundings, and experience the spiritual atmosphere before returning to Kathmandu.

Travel from Kathmandu to Pokhara via the Prithvi Highway, enjoying scenic views of rivers, hills, and rural villages. Spend the evening exploring the lakeside area and preparing for the next day's journey.

Travel to Andhi Khola and enjoy a day exploring the beautiful riverside environment. Take a nature walk along the river, admire the surrounding hills and terraced fields, interact with local communities, and capture stunning photographs of the valley.
Return to Pokhara and visit the local market or enjoy the lakeside atmosphere before beginning the journey back to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Jiri, enjoying scenic mountain roads, rivers, forests, and traditional villages. Explore the local market and experience the gateway to eastern Himalayan trekking routes.
Visit Ankhu Khola and spend the day exploring the riverside environment. Enjoy nature walks, photography, and the peaceful surroundings while experiencing the rural lifestyle of the area.
Visit the famous Dolakha Bhimsen Temple, one of Nepal's important religious and cultural landmarks. Explore the temple complex and enjoy panoramic views of the surrounding hills.
Explore Charikot Bazaar, enjoy local cuisine, shop for handicrafts, and experience the culture of the Dolakha region before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Pokhara and enjoy scenic views of rivers, terraced fields, and hills. Explore Lakeside in the evening and prepare for the trek.
Drive to Nayapul and begin trekking through beautiful villages and terraced farmland before reaching the first overnight stop.
Trek through dense rhododendron forests and traditional Gurung settlements while enjoying panoramic mountain views.
Continue through bamboo forests, waterfalls, and narrow valleys before reaching Deurali, the final stop before base camp.
Reach Annapurna Base Camp and witness breathtaking panoramic views of Annapurna I, Machhapuchhre, Hiunchuli, and Gangapurna. Enjoy sunrise and the magnificent Himalayan amphitheater.
Travel from Kathmandu to Pokhara via the Prithvi Highway. Enjoy scenic views of rivers, hills, and villages before spending the evening exploring the beautiful Lakeside area.

Ride the Annapurna Cable Car and enjoy breathtaking views of the Annapurna mountain range, Pokhara Valley, and surrounding forests. Visit the hilltop station, relax in the peaceful environment, and capture panoramic photographs.
Spend the morning at Phewa Lake enjoying the lakeside atmosphere, boating, and photography before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Besisahar, the gateway to the Annapurna Circuit. Enjoy scenic views of rivers, terraced fields, and traditional villages.
Travel through beautiful mountain roads to Chame. Explore the local village and enjoy spectacular views of Lamjung Himal and surrounding peaks.
Continue trekking to Pisang through pine forests, waterfalls, and traditional settlements while enjoying breathtaking Himalayan scenery.
Reach Manang and spend the day exploring the traditional Himalayan village, monasteries, and surrounding viewpoints while acclimatizing to the altitude.
Continue along the Annapurna Circuit, experiencing dramatic mountain landscapes, alpine meadows, glaciers, and spectacular panoramic views of the Annapurna range.
Trek to Thorong Phedi, the base camp for crossing the famous Thorong La Pass. Rest and prepare for the high-altitude adventure.
Cross the iconic Thorong La Pass and descend to Muktinath Temple, one of Nepal's most sacred pilgrimage sites.
Explore Jomsom, a picturesque town in the Kali Gandaki Valley known for its apple orchards, mountain views, and unique culture.
Relax in the natural hot springs of Tatopani and enjoy the peaceful mountain environment after several days of trekking.
Travel to Pokhara and conclude the Annapurna Circuit adventure before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Pokhara and enjoy scenic views of rivers, terraced fields, and green hills. Spend the evening exploring the Lakeside area and preparing for the trek.
Begin the trek to Australian Camp through beautiful forests and traditional villages. Enjoy magnificent views of Annapurna South, Machhapuchhre, Hiunchuli, and Lamjung Himal.
Trek to the traditional Gurung village of Dhampus. Explore the village, interact with local communities, and admire panoramic Himalayan views from one of the region's best viewpoints.
Visit Sarangkot to witness a spectacular sunrise over the Annapurna and Dhaulagiri mountain ranges. Enjoy photography, peaceful surroundings, and sweeping views of Pokhara Valley.
Return to Pokhara, explore nearby attractions or relax by Phewa Lake before beginning the journey back to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Pokhara, enjoying scenic views of rivers, terraced hills, and picturesque villages. Spend the evening preparing for the trek.
Travel to Ghandruk, a beautiful Gurung village known for its traditional culture, stone houses, and panoramic views of Annapurna South and Machhapuchhre.
Trek through forests and terraced fields to Chhomrong, the gateway to the Annapurna Sanctuary. Enjoy spectacular mountain scenery and local hospitality.
Continue through dense bamboo and rhododendron forests alongside the Modi Khola, experiencing the rich biodiversity of the Annapurna Conservation Area.
Reach Annapurna Sanctuary and immerse yourself in the magnificent Himalayan amphitheater surrounded by towering snow-capped peaks. Enjoy panoramic mountain views and unforgettable alpine scenery.
Explore the Annapurna Base Camp area, witness an incredible sunrise over the Annapurna massif, and experience one of Nepal's most iconic mountain destinations.
Descend to Jhinu Danda and relax in the famous natural hot springs after several days of trekking.
Return to Pokhara and begin the journey back to Kathmandu, concluding an unforgettable Himalayan trekking adventure.
Travel from Kathmandu to Pokhara through scenic river valleys and hills. Explore the lakeside area and prepare for the trek.
Travel to the beautiful Gurung village of Ghandruk. Explore the traditional settlement while enjoying panoramic views of Annapurna South and Machhapuchhre.
Trek through forests and terraced fields to Chhomrong, one of the main gateways to the Annapurna region.

Continue toward the Annapurna South viewpoint area. Enjoy breathtaking views of Annapurna South, Hiunchuli, Machhapuchhre, and surrounding Himalayan peaks while experiencing the pristine alpine environment.
Visit Annapurna Base Camp and witness magnificent panoramic views of the Annapurna Sanctuary and surrounding snow-capped mountains.
Descend through bamboo and rhododendron forests while enjoying beautiful mountain scenery and peaceful surroundings.
Return to Pokhara and begin the journey back to Kathmandu, concluding the trekking adventure.
Travel from Kathmandu to Pokhara via the Prithvi Highway while enjoying beautiful views of rivers, hills, and traditional villages. Spend the evening exploring the Lakeside area.

Visit Armala Cave and explore its impressive limestone formations, underground passages, and naturally carved chambers. Learn about the cave's geological significance while enjoying the peaceful natural surroundings.
Visit Mahendra Cave, another famous limestone cave in Pokhara, known for its fascinating rock formations and underground pathways. After sightseeing, return to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Kushma, the headquarters of Parbat District. Enjoy scenic mountain highways, rivers, and beautiful hill landscapes. Explore the local market and nearby viewpoints.

Visit Arthar Danda and enjoy breathtaking views of the Annapurna and Dhaulagiri ranges. Explore nearby walking trails, terraced farmlands, and traditional villages while experiencing the peaceful hill environment.
Visit the Kaligandaki River and enjoy the dramatic river valley scenery. Relax by the riverside, take photographs, and experience the natural beauty of the region before returning to Kathmandu.

Travel from Kathmandu to Gorkha via the Prithvi Highway while enjoying scenic rivers, hills, and countryside landscapes. Visit the lively Gorkha Bazaar and experience the local culture before continuing to Arughat for an overnight stay.

Explore Arughat and enjoy the peaceful surroundings of the Budhi Gandaki River. Visit nearby suspension bridges, traditional villages, local markets, and riverside viewpoints. Learn about the area's importance as the gateway to the Manaslu trekking route and experience the warm hospitality of the local community.

Spend the morning relaxing along the Budhi Gandaki River, enjoying the fresh mountain air and scenic river valley. Capture beautiful photographs of the surrounding hills before beginning the return journey to Kathmandu with memorable experiences of rural Gorkha.

Travel from Kathmandu to Pokhara by tourist bus while enjoying scenic rivers, green hills, and mountain landscapes. After reaching Pokhara, continue to Astam Village, check into your accommodation, and enjoy a peaceful evening with spectacular sunset views over the Annapurna and Machhapuchhre ranges.

Explore Astam Village by walking through traditional Gurung settlements, terraced farmlands, and scenic trails. Enjoy panoramic views of Annapurna, Machhapuchhre, and Dhaulagiri, interact with local residents, experience the rural lifestyle, and capture beautiful sunrise and mountain photographs.

Visit the nearby village of Dhampus, another renowned Himalayan viewpoint known for its mountain scenery and cultural atmosphere. Enjoy a short village walk and breathtaking Himalayan views before returning to Pokhara and traveling back to Kathmandu.

Travel from Kathmandu to Pokhara by tourist bus while enjoying scenic rivers, hills, and countryside landscapes. After reaching Pokhara, drive to Kande and hike to Australian Camp. Check in to your lodge and enjoy the beautiful sunset over the Annapurna Himalayan range.

Wake up early to witness the spectacular Himalayan sunrise. Explore Australian Camp, enjoy panoramic views of Annapurna South, Machhapuchhre, Hiunchuli, and Dhaulagiri, take short nature walks through rhododendron forests, and experience the peaceful mountain environment.

Hike from Australian Camp to the traditional Gurung village of Dhampus. Explore the village, enjoy mountain scenery and local culture, then drive back to Pokhara before returning to Kathmandu by tourist bus.

Travel from Kathmandu to Beni via the Prithvi Highway while enjoying scenic rivers, lush hills, and mountain landscapes. Explore the local market of Beni before continuing to Babiyachaur for an overnight stay.

Spend the day exploring Babiyachaur and its surrounding countryside. Walk through traditional villages, terraced farmlands, and riverside areas while experiencing the local culture and peaceful natural environment. Capture beautiful views of the surrounding hills and enjoy the authentic rural lifestyle.

Visit the nearby Kaligandaki River and enjoy its beautiful river valley scenery. Relax by the riverside, take photographs, and experience the tranquil atmosphere before returning to Kathmandu with memorable experiences from Myagdi District.

Travel from Kathmandu to Beni by tourist bus, enjoying scenic highways, rivers, and beautiful hill landscapes along the way. After a short exploration of Beni Bazaar, continue towards Badal Danda and check in to your accommodation. Spend the evening enjoying the peaceful mountain atmosphere.

Explore Badal Danda and enjoy magnificent panoramic views of the Annapurna and Dhaulagiri mountain ranges. Take a leisurely hike through forest trails and open hilltops, experience the tranquil environment, capture stunning photographs, and witness a memorable Himalayan sunrise or sunset.

Visit nearby Mohare Danda, another popular Himalayan viewpoint known for its breathtaking scenery and eco-friendly tourism. Enjoy the surrounding landscapes and fresh mountain air before returning to Beni and traveling back to Kathmandu.

Travel from Kathmandu to Beni by tourist bus while enjoying scenic rivers, green hills, and mountain landscapes. Explore the local market and nearby cultural sites before continuing towards Baglung for an overnight stay.

Visit Baglung Bazaar and explore its vibrant local market, cultural heritage, temples, and nearby viewpoints. Experience the local lifestyle, sample regional cuisine, and enjoy the scenic beauty of the surrounding hills.

Visit Baglung Kalika Temple, one of the district's most significant religious sites. Enjoy the peaceful surroundings, observe the temple's cultural importance, and take in panoramic views of the surrounding hills before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Beni Bazaar by tourist bus while enjoying scenic river valleys and hill landscapes. Explore the local market and continue the journey to Baglung for an overnight stay.

Visit Baglung Kalika Temple and participate in prayers while exploring the temple complex dedicated to Goddess Kalika. Walk through the surrounding forest area, admire the traditional pagoda architecture, and enjoy the peaceful environment overlooking the Kali Gandaki River.

Visit Bhimsen Temple Baglung, an important religious site in the district. Explore the temple surroundings, learn about its cultural significance, and experience the spiritual atmosphere before returning to Kathmandu.

Travel from Kathmandu to Besisahar by tourist bus while enjoying scenic rivers, green hills, and countryside landscapes. Explore the local market before continuing to Bahundanda for an overnight stay.

Explore Bahundanda Village, walk through traditional settlements and terraced fields, enjoy panoramic mountain views, interact with local communities, and experience the unique Gurung culture and peaceful surroundings.

Visit Ngadi, a picturesque village known for its beautiful waterfalls, suspension bridges, and scenic landscapes. Enjoy a short nature walk and capture memorable photographs before returning to Kathmandu.

Travel from Kathmandu to Baglung Bazaar by tourist bus while enjoying scenic rivers, hills, and traditional settlements. Explore the local market and experience the cultural atmosphere before continuing to Balewa for an overnight stay.

Visit the Balewa Airport Area and explore the surroundings of the historic Baglung Airport. Enjoy panoramic views of the Kali Gandaki Valley, walk around the peaceful countryside, and experience the natural beauty and rural lifestyle of the area.

Visit Baglung Kalika Temple, one of Baglung's most important religious landmarks. Explore the temple complex, enjoy the serene forest surroundings, and admire the scenic views before returning to Kathmandu.

Travel from Kathmandu to Pokhara by tourist bus and continue to Chhomrong. Explore the traditional Gurung village, enjoy spectacular Himalayan views, and begin the trek toward Bamboo Lodge for an overnight stay.

Explore Bamboo Lodge and its surrounding bamboo and rhododendron forests. Enjoy peaceful hiking trails, observe the rich natural beauty of the Annapurna region, relax in the tranquil mountain environment, and experience the hospitality of local teahouses.

Visit Bamboo, a scenic trekking stop surrounded by lush forests and mountain landscapes. Enjoy a short nature walk, capture memorable photographs, and return to Pokhara before traveling back to Kathmandu.

Travel from Kathmandu to Damauli by tourist bus while enjoying scenic rivers and rolling hills. Explore the district headquarters, visit the local market, and experience the cultural atmosphere before continuing to Bandipur for an overnight stay.

Explore the historic town of Bandipur, stroll through its stone-paved streets, admire the traditional Newari architecture, visit local temples and heritage sites, enjoy panoramic Himalayan views, and experience the unique local culture and cuisine.

Visit Byas Cave, a renowned religious and historical site in Tanahun. Explore the cave and its peaceful surroundings, learn about its cultural significance, and enjoy the scenic landscape before returning to Kathmandu.

Travel from Kathmandu to Pokhara by tourist bus and continue towards Ghorepani. Enjoy scenic mountain trails, rhododendron forests, and beautiful Himalayan landscapes before trekking to Banthanti for an overnight stay.

Explore Banthanti and enjoy peaceful walks through lush rhododendron forests while experiencing panoramic views of the surrounding Himalayan ranges. Observe the rich biodiversity of the Annapurna region and relax in the serene mountain environment.

Visit Tadapani, a scenic trekking destination known for its spectacular Himalayan views and beautiful forest trails. Enjoy nature photography and breathtaking mountain scenery before returning to Pokhara and traveling back to Kathmandu.

Travel from Kathmandu to Gorkha Durbar by tourist bus while enjoying scenic rivers, hills, and rural landscapes. Explore the historic town and local market before continuing to Barpak Village for an overnight stay.

Explore Barpak Village by walking through traditional Gurung settlements, interacting with local communities, and enjoying panoramic views of the surrounding Himalayan ranges. Experience the unique culture, architecture, and peaceful mountain environment.

Visit Laprak Village, another beautiful Gurung settlement in Gorkha District. Explore the village, enjoy breathtaking mountain scenery, and experience the traditional lifestyle before returning to Kathmandu.

Travel from Kathmandu to Pokhara and visit the iconic Phewa Lake. Enjoy a relaxing boat ride, explore the vibrant Lakeside area, and admire the beautiful reflection of the Annapurna range on the lake.

Spend the day exploring Basundhara Park. Enjoy peaceful walks through the landscaped gardens, relax in the green open spaces, have a picnic, and capture beautiful photographs in the tranquil surroundings.
Visit the World Peace Pagoda for panoramic views of Pokhara Valley, Phewa Lake, and the Annapurna mountain range before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Musikot Rukum, the district headquarters of Rukum West. Explore the local market and enjoy the surrounding mountain scenery before preparing for the trek.
Visit Chaurjahari and experience its peaceful environment, nearby hills, and traditional settlements. It serves as an excellent stop before heading deeper into the trekking region.
Begin trekking along the Aathbiskot Border Trail, following scenic mountain paths through forests and river valleys. Enjoy panoramic landscapes and the region's untouched natural beauty.
Explore the banks of the Sani Bheri River, known for its clear water, beautiful surroundings, and peaceful atmosphere. Relax, take photographs, and enjoy the riverside landscape.
Visit the Rukum Cultural Museum to learn about the history, traditions, and lifestyle of the local communities before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Bijuwar, the commercial center of Pyuthan. Explore the local market, interact with residents, and enjoy the surrounding hill scenery.
Visit Airawati Rural Hills and enjoy breathtaking views of rolling hills, traditional villages, and terraced farmland. Experience the peaceful rural lifestyle and capture beautiful photographs.
Explore the scenic Jhimruk Valley, known for its green landscapes, rivers, agricultural terraces, and picturesque villages. Enjoy nature walks and the tranquil environment.
Visit the famous Swargadwari pilgrimage site, renowned for its spiritual significance, mountain scenery, and peaceful surroundings. Explore the temple area and enjoy panoramic Himalayan views.
Spend the morning exploring Pyuthan Khalanga, visiting local markets and experiencing the district's culture before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to the historic town of Tansen in Palpa. Explore the charming streets, traditional Newari houses, and local markets while enjoying panoramic hill views.

Visit Amar Narayan Temple and admire its traditional pagoda architecture, detailed wood carvings, and peaceful religious setting. Learn about the temple's history and its importance in Palpa's cultural heritage.
Explore the historic Tansen Durbar, an important cultural landmark showcasing traditional architecture and the rich history of the former Palpa Kingdom.
Travel from Kathmandu to Ghorahi, the administrative center of Dang District. Explore the local market and experience the vibrant culture and hospitality of the region.
Visit the sacred Ambikeshwari Temple and participate in religious activities. Admire the traditional architecture, learn about the temple's history, and enjoy the peaceful spiritual atmosphere.
Explore the scenic Dang Valley, known for its fertile plains, surrounding hills, and rich Tharu culture. Enjoy nature, photography, and interactions with local communities.
Visit the Rapti River and enjoy the tranquil riverside environment. Relax, take photographs, and appreciate the natural beauty before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Sandhikharka, the district headquarters of Arghakhanchi. Explore the local market, experience the town's culture, and enjoy scenic hill views.

Visit the historic Arghakhanchi Durbar Area and explore its traditional architecture, cultural heritage, and historical importance. Learn about the region's history while enjoying the peaceful surroundings.
Visit the famous Supa Deurali Temple, a revered Hindu pilgrimage site. Experience its spiritual atmosphere, admire the surrounding hills, and enjoy panoramic views.
Explore Khanchikot, known for its historic hilltop fort area, natural beauty, and scenic landscapes. Enjoy short hikes, photography, and panoramic views before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Tamghas, the headquarters of Gulmi District. Explore the local market, traditional settlements, and enjoy the scenic hill landscapes.
Visit Arjun Cave and explore its impressive limestone formations, natural chambers, and unique rock structures. Learn about the cave's history while enjoying the peaceful natural surroundings.
Visit Resunga Hill, one of Gulmi's most popular scenic and religious destinations. Enjoy panoramic views, explore the temple area, and experience the tranquil hill environment.
Take a refreshing walk through Resunga Forest, known for its rich biodiversity and serene atmosphere. Enjoy nature photography before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Lumbini and explore the peaceful Lumbini Garden. Walk through the beautifully maintained grounds and experience the spiritual atmosphere of this UNESCO World Heritage Site.

Visit the historic Ashoka Pillar, built by Emperor Ashoka to commemorate the birthplace of Lord Buddha. Learn about its historical inscription and significance while exploring the surrounding sacred area.

Explore the Maya Devi Temple, the sacred temple marking the exact birthplace of Lord Buddha. Visit the archaeological remains, sacred pond, and nearby monasteries representing Buddhist traditions from around the world.
Visit the World Peace Pagoda and enjoy its peaceful surroundings before exploring nearby monasteries and returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Bardiya and reach Thakurdwara. Explore the local community, enjoy the peaceful surroundings, and prepare for the next day's activities.
Spend the day at Babai River enjoying riverside walks, nature photography, birdwatching, and optional rafting. Experience the calm atmosphere and beautiful natural scenery.

Visit Bardiya National Park for a guided jungle safari. Observe wildlife such as deer, crocodiles, wild elephants, and, if fortunate, the Royal Bengal Tiger. Enjoy birdwatching and explore the park's diverse ecosystem.
Visit the Karnali Bridge for scenic views of the Karnali River and surrounding landscapes before beginning the return journey to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Thakurdwara in Bardiya. Explore the local village, experience the peaceful atmosphere, and prepare for the adventure ahead.
Visit Babai River Gorge and explore its dramatic cliffs, flowing river, and scenic viewpoints. Enjoy nature walks, photography, and the unique geological landscape.

Spend the day exploring Bardiya National Park on a guided jungle safari. Observe wildlife such as deer, crocodiles, wild elephants, and numerous bird species while learning about the park's ecosystem.
Relax along the banks of the Babai River, enjoy the peaceful riverside scenery, and take in the natural beauty before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Thakurdwara, the gateway to Bardiya National Park. Explore the local Tharu community and enjoy the peaceful rural atmosphere.
Spend the day exploring Babai Valley. Enjoy panoramic valley views, riverside walks, birdwatching, and the beautiful natural landscapes surrounded by forests and hills.
Take a guided jungle safari through Bardiya National Park. Search for Bengal tigers, one-horned rhinoceroses, wild elephants, deer, crocodiles, and hundreds of bird species.
Visit Babai River Gorge to admire its dramatic cliffs, flowing river, and spectacular scenery. Enjoy photography and a relaxing nature walk.
Spend the morning beside the Babai River, enjoying the peaceful riverside environment before beginning your return journey to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Baglung Bazaar, the district headquarters. Explore the local market, experience the culture of the town, and enjoy views of the surrounding hills.

Spend the day at Badi Gad River enjoying riverside walks, nature photography, birdwatching, and the peaceful atmosphere. Visitors can also relax by the river or try recreational fishing where permitted.
Visit the famous Kalika Bhagwati Temple, one of Baglung's most important religious sites. Enjoy the temple's spiritual atmosphere and panoramic views of the surrounding mountains and valleys.
Explore the Shaligram Museum to learn about the sacred Shaligram fossils, their religious significance, and the geological heritage of the Kali Gandaki region before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Musikot Rukum, the district headquarters. Explore the local market, enjoy the surrounding mountain scenery, and experience the culture of western Nepal.
Visit Bafikot and enjoy panoramic hill views, peaceful villages, terraced farmland, and nature walks. Experience the traditional lifestyle of the local community and capture beautiful photographs.
Spend the day at Syarpu Lake, a beautiful freshwater lake surrounded by green hills. Enjoy boating (if available), photography, birdwatching, and a relaxing walk around the lakeside.
Visit the Rukum Cultural Museum to learn about the history, traditions, and cultural heritage of Rukum West before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Palpa Tansen. Explore the historic town, walk through the local market, visit traditional streets, and enjoy the beautiful hill scenery. Stay overnight in Tansen.
Visit Bagnaskali and enjoy its peaceful villages, green hills, terraced farmland, and natural surroundings. Experience the local culture, interact with the community, and enjoy scenic viewpoints.
Visit the historic Rani Mahal located beside the Kaligandaki River. Enjoy the beautiful riverside landscape, photography, and relax while exploring one of Palpa's most famous heritage attractions.
Visit the sacred Bhairabsthan Temple before heading to Srinagar Hill for panoramic views of the surrounding mountains and valleys. Return to Kathmandu after completing the tour.
Travel from Kathmandu to Nepalgunj. Explore the city, visit local markets, and experience the cultural diversity of Banke before checking into your accommodation.
Visit Baijanath Temple and participate in religious activities. Explore the temple complex, learn about its cultural and spiritual significance, and enjoy the peaceful surroundings.
Visit the sacred Bageshwori Temple for worship and sightseeing. Later, relax at Fulbari Park Nepalgunj, enjoying the peaceful environment and recreational spaces.
Spend the morning exploring Banke National Park, known for its rich biodiversity and natural beauty. After sightseeing, begin your return journey to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Taulihawa, the gateway to Kapilvastu. Explore the local area, experience the culture of the district, and prepare for the heritage tour.

Visit Banganga River and enjoy its peaceful riverside environment. Spend time relaxing by the river, taking photographs, enjoying nature, and participating in light recreational activities such as riverside walks or rafting (seasonal, if available).

Visit the ancient archaeological site of Tilaurakot, believed to be the capital of the Shakya Kingdom, followed by a tour of the Kapilvastu Museum to learn about the history and heritage of the region.

Explore Jagdishpur Reservoir, an important wetland and birdwatching destination, before visiting the Buddha Circuit Route to experience the Buddhist heritage of Kapilvastu. Return to Kathmandu after completing the tour.
Travel from Kathmandu to Nepalgunj. Explore the local market, experience the culture of Banke District, and prepare for the wildlife adventure.
Spend the day exploring Banke National Park. Enjoy a guided jungle safari, observe wildlife in their natural habitat, experience birdwatching, and learn about the park's unique ecosystem.
Visit the sacred Baijanath Temple and experience its peaceful spiritual atmosphere. Later, relax at Fulbari Park Nepalgunj, enjoying the gardens and recreational surroundings.
Visit the famous Bageshwori Temple, one of Banke's important religious sites. Explore the temple complex, experience local culture, and return to Kathmandu after completing the tour.
Travel from Kathmandu to Dhankuta Bazaar. Explore the local market, experience the culture of the area, and enjoy the peaceful hill-town atmosphere.
Visit Bardaghat and explore the surrounding town area. Experience the local lifestyle, visit nearby markets, and enjoy the natural scenery.
Visit Mahadev Gufa Dhankuta, a popular cave known for its natural beauty and religious significance. Enjoy sightseeing and photography.
Explore Sidhing Village, interact with the local community, experience the traditional rural lifestyle, and return to Kathmandu after completing the tour.
Travel from Kathmandu to Bardiya and arrive at Thakurdwara, the main tourism gateway to Bardiya National Park. Check in to your accommodation and explore the local Tharu community.
Visit the Bardiya Elephant Stable Area to observe elephant care and management. Learn about the role of elephants in conservation and enjoy photography around the elephant camp
Spend the day exploring Bardiya National Park with a guided jungle safari. Enjoy wildlife viewing, birdwatching, and the opportunity to experience one of Nepal's richest protected forests.
Visit the Karnali River for sightseeing and nature photography before returning to Kathmandu. The river is well known for its scenic beauty and wildlife habitat.
Travel from Kathmandu to Thakurdwara, the main gateway to Bardiya National Park. Explore the local Tharu community, enjoy the peaceful surroundings, and check in to your accommodation.
Spend the day exploring Bardiya National Park on a guided jungle safari. Observe wildlife in their natural habitat, enjoy birdwatching, nature walks, and learn about the park's rich biodiversity.
Visit the Bardiya Elephant Stable Area to observe elephant conservation and management. Learn about the role of elephants in park operations and enjoy photography around the elephant camp.
Visit the Karnali River to enjoy its scenic beauty, peaceful riverside environment, and opportunities for nature photography before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Dhangadhi, the gateway to Kailali District. Explore the local market, experience the culture of the region, and check in to your accommodation.
Spend the day exploring Basanta Corridor Forest. Enjoy guided nature walks, observe native flora and fauna, experience birdwatching, and relax in the peaceful forest environment.
Visit the beautiful Ghodaghodi Lake, a Ramsar-listed wetland famous for its biodiversity. Enjoy boating (if available), birdwatching, photography, and the tranquil lakeside scenery.
Visit the Mohana River and enjoy its natural surroundings before returning to Kathmandu. Spend time relaxing by the riverside and capturing the scenic landscapes.
Travel from Kathmandu to Basgadhi. Explore the town, visit the local market, experience the culture of Bardiya, and enjoy the peaceful surroundings.
Visit Bardiya National Park for a guided jungle safari. Observe wildlife, enjoy birdwatching, and experience the park's rich biodiversity and natural beauty.
Visit the Bardiya Elephant Stable Area to learn about elephant conservation and management. Observe elephants up close and enjoy photography around the elephant camp.
Spend the morning at the Karnali River, enjoying its scenic riverside views, peaceful atmosphere, and opportunities for nature photography before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Bhairahawa. Explore the city, visit the local market, and experience the vibrant culture of Rupandehi before checking into your accommodation.
Visit Belahiya Border Point and observe one of Nepal's busiest international border crossings. Learn about cross-border trade, experience the lively atmosphere, and explore the surrounding area.

Visit Lumbini, the birthplace of Lord Buddha. Explore the Maya Devi Temple, monasteries, sacred garden, and peaceful surroundings while learning about the area's historical and religious significance.
Visit Devdaha, an important historical and cultural site associated with the Shakya and Koliya kingdoms. Explore its heritage and tranquil surroundings before returning to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Tansen. Explore the historic town, visit the local market, admire the traditional architecture, and enjoy the scenic hill views before checking into your accommodation.
Visit Bhairabsthan Temple and participate in religious activities. Explore the temple complex, learn about its historical and spiritual significance, and enjoy the peaceful surroundings.
Visit the historic Rani Mahal, popularly known as the "Taj Mahal of Nepal." Enjoy the beautiful riverside scenery, photography, and learn about the palace's rich history.
Visit Srinagar Hill to enjoy panoramic views of the Himalayas, surrounding hills, and Tansen Valley. After sightseeing, return to Kathmandu.
Travel from Kathmandu to Bhairahawa. Check in to your accommodation, explore the city, visit local markets, and experience the vibrant atmosphere of Rupandehi.

Visit Bhairahawa Cultural Market to explore local handicrafts, traditional foods, cultural products, and the lively commercial environment. Experience the local lifestyle and enjoy shopping for souvenirs.
Visit Lumbini, the birthplace of Lord Buddha. Explore the Maya Devi Temple, monasteries, sacred garden, and other important Buddhist heritage sites while enjoying the peaceful surroundings.

Visit Belahiya Border Point, one of Nepal's major international border crossings. Experience the lively trade environment, observe cross-border activities, and return to Kathmandu after completing the tour.
Travel from Kathmandu to Bhalubang. Explore the town, visit the local market, and enjoy the peaceful atmosphere while experiencing the local culture of Dang District.
Visit Purandhara Waterfall, one of Dang's beautiful natural attractions. Enjoy the refreshing waterfall, scenic surroundings, nature walks, and photography.
Explore Deukhuri Valley, known for its fertile landscapes and peaceful environment. Experience the rural lifestyle, enjoy the natural scenery, and relax in the valley.
Visit Lamahi Cultural Village to experience the traditional lifestyle, local customs, and cultural heritage of Dang District before returning to Kathmandu.
Arrival, transfer to Rara region and local sightseeing.
Boating, lakeside walk and sunset photography.
Early morning hike for panoramic Himalayan views.
Wildlife observation before departure.
